zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Perrot於大約1382年出生在威爾士安格萊時，他的父親Stephen Perrot23歲，母親Elen Howel21歲。他於1409年與Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton在威爾士布洛可爾皮可頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1460年4月10日在英國布里斯托享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Perrot于大约1382年出生在威尔士安格萊时，他的父亲Stephen Perrot23岁，母亲Elen Howel21岁。他于1409年与Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton在威尔士布洛可爾皮可頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1460年4月10日在英国布里斯托享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Perrot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Gilles, Veronique.
French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Perre, a variant of Pierre , French form of Peter . Compare Perrotte .
Breton: from a French-influenced pet form (see 1 above) of the personal name Per, Breton form of Peter . Compare Perro .

variants.name: Pierre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Antoine, Yves, Michel, Jean Claude, Mireille, Jean Robert, Francois, Monique, Raoul, Serge.
French, Walloon, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian:

from the personal name Pierre, French form of Peter (see also below). This is one of the most frequent surnames in Haiti (along with Jean and Joseph ) and in Saint Martin. It is also established elsewhere in the West Indies (e.g. in Trinidad and Tobago, Saint Lucia, Grenada, and Bahamas).

variants.name: Perrotte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Damien, Henri.
Altered form of French Perrot or Perrault , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
French: from the feminine form of   Perrot  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Perrot was born about 1382, in Anglesey, Wales, his father, Stephen Perrot, was 23 and his mother, Elen Howel, was 21. He married Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton in 1409, in Picton, Pembrokeshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 10 April 1460, in Bristol, England, at the age of 79.

fr.Picton, Slebets, Pembrokeshire, Wales: Picton, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Perrot est né environ 1382, à Anglesey, Galles, son père, Stephen Perrot, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elen Howel, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton en 1409, à Picton, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1460, à Bristol, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Perrot um 1382 in Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen Perrot 23 und seine Mutter Elen Howel 21. Er hat 1409 in Picton, Pembrokeshire, Wales Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 10. April 1460 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Bristol, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Perrot è nato il circa 1382 nel Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Stephen Perrot, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elen Howel, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton nel 1409, nel Picton, Pembrokeshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 10 aprile 1460, nel Bristol, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Perrotが約1382年にウェールズアングレセイで生まれた時，父Stephen Perrotは23歳，母Elen Howelは21歳であった。1409年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアピクトンでAlice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Pictonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1460年4月10日にイギリスブリストルで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Perrot(이)가 대략 1382년 웨일스 앤글레시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Perrot(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elen Howel(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1409년 웨일스 p브로케실르 피크턴에서 Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 4월 10일 영국 브리스톨에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Perrot nasceu aproximadamente 1382, em Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Stephen Perrot, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elen Howel, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton em 1409, em Picton, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1460, em Bristol, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Perrot родился около 1382 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Stephen Perrot было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elen Howel, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton в 1409 г. в местности пиктон, пемброкешир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 10 апреля 1460 г. в местности бристол, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Perrot nació aproximadamente 1382, en Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Stephen Perrot, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elen Howel, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Alice Lady Pembroke Monmou Wales Picton en 1409, en Picton, Pembrokeshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 10 de abril de 1460, en Bristol, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
